roadmap.title: Reach the Hold and open the core systems
roadmap.description: Finish the tutorial and Tricephalos, recruit Duchess and Revenant, and use the first relic and Vessel while learning the two-day Expedition loop.

roadmap.title: Defeat every Nightlord and reach the ending
roadmap.description: Complete the seven named Nightlord Expeditions, unlock Night Aspect after four wins, defeat Heolstor, choose Offer the Nightlord's Rune, and finish the eight-Nightlord set.

roadmap.title: Clear Shifting Earth secrets and raids
roadmap.description: Complete the four base Shifting Earth locations on one save and use the predictable Expedition counts to trigger and finish all four raid achievements.

roadmap.title: Finish equipment and single-run challenges
roadmap.description: Buy the remaining hub unlocks, then route dedicated Expeditions for level 15, seven flasks, ten Great Enemies, the Oldest Gaol, legendary gear, and the high-rarity loadout.

roadmap.title: Complete character wins and the victory streak
roadmap.description: Record a Nightlord victory with every base character, then use three comfortable but different Expeditions for an uninterrupted three-win streak.

roadmap.title: Claim full completion
roadmap.description: Confirm that all thirty-six non-meta base achievements are unlocked; Nightreign then completes the base-game set.

achievements.summary: Unlock all other @mechanic{36 base-game achievements} in ELDEN RING NIGHTREIGN.

guide.context: Forsaken Hollows and any other DLC achievements are outside the base list and are not required for this completion achievement.

steps.text: Finish every achievement from The Shrouded Roundtable Hold through Nightlord Slayer in the base-game list; Nightreign unlocks with the thirty-sixth non-meta base achievement.

achievements.summary: Finish the tutorial, or lose twice to the @enemy{Fell Omen}, to reach the @loc{Shrouded Roundtable Hold}.

guide.context: The tutorial outcome does not block progression: two defeats move the character to the hub automatically.

steps.text: Complete the opening tutorial encounter; if the @enemy{Fell Omen} defeats you, enter again and let the second attempt conclude.
Wait for the transition into the @loc{Shrouded Roundtable Hold}; the achievement unlocks when the hub becomes available.

achievements.summary: Complete any @mechanic{Expedition} to make the Nightlords appear.

guide.context: An Expedition counts only when its final Nightlord is defeated; an early defeat still awards relics but does not advance this milestone.

steps.text: At the central table in the @loc{Shrouded Roundtable Hold}, select any available Expedition.
Survive both days and defeat the Expedition's final @enemy{Nightlord}.

achievements.summary: Complete any @mechanic{four Expeditions} to make the Night Aspect appear.

guide.context: The four completions can be different targets or repeats; the milestone triggers when the Roundtable Hold darkens.

steps.text: Defeat the final Nightlord in four Expeditions.
Return to the @loc{Shrouded Roundtable Hold} after the fourth completion and allow the darkened-hub scene to finish.

achievements.summary: Give the @item{Old Pocketwatch} to the @npc{Priestess} in the Roundtable Hold to unlock Duchess.

guide.context: The Old Pocketwatch can appear as an earlier Expedition reward and is guaranteed after completing Tricephalos.

steps.text: Complete @mechanic{Tricephalos} and collect the @item{Old Pocketwatch} from the post-Expedition rewards if it has not dropped earlier.
Speak to the @npc{Priestess} in the @loc{Shrouded Roundtable Hold} and hand over the Old Pocketwatch.

achievements.summary: Buy the @item{Besmirched Frame} for 1,500 Murk, touch the ghost doll on the east side of the @loc{Shrouded Roundtable Hold}, and defeat Revenant and her three spirits.

guide.context: The Besmirched Frame appears only after Duchess has joined; the resulting fight is a solo character-unlock trial inside the hub.

steps.text: Once Duchess is playable, spend @mechanic{1,500 Murk} at the @npc{Small Jar Bazaar} on the @item{Besmirched Frame}.
Follow the yellow exclamation marker to the east side of the Roundtable Hold and interact with the ghostly doll.
Defeat @enemy{Revenant and her three summoned spirits} in the transported arena.

achievements.summary: After defeating Heolstor, choose @mechanic{Offer the Nightlord's Rune} at the cliffside NPC.

guide.context: Character-specific Remembrance options lead to their own scenes and do not trigger the general ending required here.

steps.text: Complete @mechanic{Night Aspect} and return to the Roundtable Hold.
Approach the seated NPC by the cliff, speak to them, and select the exact dialogue option @mechanic{Offer the Nightlord's Rune}.

achievements.summary: Complete the @mechanic{Tricephalos Expedition} by defeating @enemy{Gladius, Beast of Night}.

guide.context: Gladius divides into three wolves during the fight; fire damage is effective against the pack.

steps.text: Select @mechanic{Tricephalos} at the Roundtable expedition table and complete Day 1 and Day 2.
On Night 3, defeat @enemy{Gladius, Beast of Night} to finish the Expedition.

achievements.summary: Complete the @mechanic{Gaping Jaw Expedition} by defeating @enemy{Adel, Baron of Night}.

guide.context: A successful run must survive both daytime routes and the Night 2 boss before the final Nightlord arena opens.

steps.text: Select @mechanic{Gaping Jaw} at the Roundtable expedition table and complete Day 1 and Day 2.
On Night 3, defeat @enemy{Adel, Baron of Night} to complete the Expedition.

achievements.summary: Complete the @mechanic{Sentient Pest Expedition} by defeating @enemy{Gnoster, Wisdom of Night}.

guide.context: A successful run must survive both daytime routes and the Night 2 boss before the final Nightlord arena opens.

steps.text: Select @mechanic{Sentient Pest} at the Roundtable expedition table and complete Day 1 and Day 2.
On Night 3, defeat @enemy{Gnoster, Wisdom of Night} to complete the Expedition.

achievements.summary: Complete the @mechanic{Augur Expedition} by defeating @enemy{Maris, Fathom of Night}.

guide.context: A successful run must survive both daytime routes and the Night 2 boss before the final Nightlord arena opens.

steps.text: Select @mechanic{Augur} at the Roundtable expedition table and complete Day 1 and Day 2.
On Night 3, defeat @enemy{Maris, Fathom of Night} to complete the Expedition.

achievements.summary: Complete the @mechanic{Equilibrious Beast Expedition} by defeating @enemy{Libra, Creature of Night}.

guide.context: A successful run must survive both daytime routes and the Night 2 boss before the final Nightlord arena opens.

steps.text: Select @mechanic{Equilibrious Beast} at the Roundtable expedition table and complete Day 1 and Day 2.
On Night 3, defeat @enemy{Libra, Creature of Night} to complete the Expedition.

achievements.summary: Complete the @mechanic{Darkdrift Knight Expedition} by defeating @enemy{Fulghor, Champion of Nightglow}.

guide.context: A successful run must survive both daytime routes and the Night 2 boss before the final Nightlord arena opens.

steps.text: Select @mechanic{Darkdrift Knight} at the Roundtable expedition table and complete Day 1 and Day 2.
On Night 3, defeat @enemy{Fulghor, Champion of Nightglow} to complete the Expedition.

achievements.summary: Complete the @mechanic{Fissure in the Fog Expedition} by defeating @enemy{Caligo, Miasma of Night}.

guide.context: A successful run must survive both daytime routes and the Night 2 boss before the final Nightlord arena opens.

steps.text: Select @mechanic{Fissure in the Fog} at the Roundtable expedition table and complete Day 1 and Day 2.
On Night 3, defeat @enemy{Caligo, Miasma of Night} to complete the Expedition.

achievements.summary: Complete the @mechanic{Night Aspect Expedition} by defeating @enemy{Heolstor the Nightlord}.

guide.context: Night Aspect becomes selectable after four completed Expeditions; an invitation from a player who has it unlocked also grants access.

steps.text: Select @mechanic{Night Aspect} at the expedition table after the Roundtable Hold darkens.
Survive both days, then defeat both phases of @enemy{Heolstor the Nightlord} on Night 3.

achievements.summary: Complete all @mechanic{eight base Expeditions} and defeat every Nightlord.

guide.context: The required targets are Tricephalos, Gaping Jaw, Sentient Pest, Augur, Equilibrious Beast, Darkdrift Knight, Fissure in the Fog, and Night Aspect.

steps.text: Complete Tricephalos, Gaping Jaw, Sentient Pest, Augur, Equilibrious Beast, Darkdrift Knight, and Fissure in the Fog.
Complete Night Aspect by defeating @enemy{Heolstor the Nightlord}.

achievements.description: Invoked the power of a relic for the first time
achievements.summary: Place a @item{relic} into a matching-color vessel slot at @mechanic{Relic Rites}.

guide.context: Every Expedition awards relics, including failed attempts, but a relic can occupy only a vessel slot with the same color.

steps.text: Finish or fail an Expedition and collect at least one @item{relic} from the reward screen.
Use @mechanic{Relic Rites} beside the central round table, choose a vessel, and place the relic in a slot of the matching color.

achievements.description: Changed garb via dresser for the first time
achievements.summary: Use @mechanic{Change Garb} in the eastern Roundtable room, then buy and equip an outfit.

guide.context: The dresser opens after two completed Expeditions; the first purchasable outfits cost 14,000 Murk.

steps.text: Complete any two Expeditions, then enter the easternmost room of the @loc{Shrouded Roundtable Hold}.
Interact with the dresser, select @mechanic{Change Garb}, buy an outfit for @mechanic{14,000 Murk}, and equip it.

achievements.description: Acquired a new vessel and conducted a different relic rite for the first time
achievements.summary: Buy a new @item{Vessel} for 1,200 Murk and equip it at @mechanic{Relic Rites}.

guide.context: The first additional Vessel enters the Small Jar Bazaar after one completed Expedition; equipping it changes the available relic-slot pattern.

steps.text: After completing one Expedition, buy any new @item{Vessel} from the @npc{Small Jar Bazaar} for @mechanic{1,200 Murk}.
Open @mechanic{Relic Rites}, select the character, and switch from the starting Vessel to the purchased Vessel.

achievements.description: Acquired a legendary armament for the first time
achievements.summary: Acquire and equip a yellow-rarity @item{legendary armament} during an Expedition.

guide.context: Legendary weapons can drop from high-tier encounters or the castle; the Crater secret provides a guaranteed upgrade for one held weapon.

steps.text: Loot a yellow weapon from a powerful boss or castle chest, or use the @loc{Crater} altar to upgrade one held weapon.
Place the yellow-rarity weapon in an active weapon slot during the same Expedition.

achievements.description: Found the secret of the Mountaintop.
achievements.summary: Climb the @loc{Mountaintop} in northwest Limveld and open the chest at the summit.

guide.context: Mountaintop has no mandatory boss, but the ascent continually builds frostbite, so warming items and quick movement reduce attrition.

steps.text: During the Mountaintop Shifting Earth event, travel to the frozen mountain in the northwest.
Follow the path upward and use the hanging chains to cross between ledges.
Reach the highest platform and open the summit chest to claim the Mountaintop secret.

achievements.description: Found the secret of the Crater.
achievements.summary: Descend through the @loc{Crater}, defeat both bosses, and open the chest in the second boss arena.

guide.context: The altar beside the final chest upgrades one weapon currently in the character's inventory to legendary rarity.

steps.text: During the Crater Shifting Earth event, enter the volcano in northern Limveld and follow the descending route.
Defeat the boss on the descent, continue to the lowest arena, and defeat the second boss.
Open the arena chest, then use the nearby altar to upgrade one held weapon to @item{legendary rarity}.

achievements.description: Found the secret of the Rotted Woods.
achievements.summary: Use the fort treasure map in the @loc{Rotted Woods}, then interact with the flower beneath the marked tree.

guide.context: The forest continuously inflicts scarlet rot until its secret is claimed; the reward grants rot immunity for the rest of that Expedition.

steps.text: During the Rotted Woods event, travel to the red-flag fort in southeast Limveld and climb to the tower beside its roof.
Pick up the treasure map in the tower; a new red flag marks the target tree.
Climb the marked tree, drop onto the large flower below, and interact with it.

achievements.description: Found the secret of Noklateo, the Shrouded City.
achievements.summary: Reach the end of @loc{Noklateo, the Shrouded City}, defeat its boss, and open the arena chest.

guide.context: The southwest city is safest on Day 2 around level 10; its secret grants one automatic revival during that Expedition.

steps.text: During the Noklateo event, enter the city in southwest Limveld and follow its main route downward.
Reach the terminal arena and defeat its boss.
Open the chest inside the defeated boss's arena to claim the city secret.

achievements.description: Found the secrets of all Shifting Earth locations
achievements.summary: Find the secrets of @loc{Mountaintop, Crater, Rotted Woods, and Noklateo} on one save.

guide.context: Shifting Earth begins after the first successful Expedition. After defeating an Everdark Sovereign, the outside Roundtable shop can force a chosen event for one Sovereign Sigil.

steps.text: Complete the secret objective in each of the four base Shifting Earth locations: Mountaintop, Crater, Rotted Woods, and Noklateo.
Earn all four location achievements on the same save file; the final secret completes the set.

achievements.summary: Unlock Duchess and Revenant, clear all eight Expeditions, then buy all @mechanic{11 Vessels} for 18,600 Murk total.

guide.context: Character unlocks and Nightlord completions expand the Small Jar Bazaar; the full Vessel inventory is unavailable before those prerequisites are finished.

steps.text: Make both hidden characters playable, then defeat the Nightlord at the end of each of the eight base Expeditions.
At the @npc{Small Jar Bazaar}, purchase every unowned Vessel until the collection contains @mechanic{11 Vessels}; the complete set costs 18,600 Murk.

achievements.description: Defeated the Nightlord with all characters.
achievements.summary: Personally defeat a Nightlord with all eight base characters: @npc{Duchess, Executor, Guardian, Ironeye, Raider, Recluse, Revenant, and Wylder}.

guide.context: Only the selected player character receives credit; a teammate using a missing character does not count. The same Nightlord may be repeated, and DLC characters are excluded.

steps.text: Track the eight required characters in this order: Duchess, Executor, Guardian, Ironeye, Raider, Recluse, Revenant, and Wylder.
Select one unchecked character, complete any Expedition, and mark that character only after the final Nightlord is defeated.
Repeat until all eight base characters have a personal Nightlord victory.

achievements.summary: Reach @mechanic{level 15} with one character during a single Expedition.

guide.context: Levels reset after every Expedition. The central castle offers dense rune rewards, and nearby squad members share runes from defeated enemies.

steps.text: Enter an Expedition, clear high-value field camps and the central castle, and remain near teammates when they defeat enemies.
Continue killing bosses and spending collected runes at Sites of Grace until the character reaches @mechanic{level 15} before the Expedition ends.

achievements.description: Acquired a great number of Sacred Flask charges.
achievements.summary: Activate @mechanic{four church altars} in one Expedition to hold seven Sacred Flask charges.

guide.context: A character starts with three charges. Some generated maps contain only three churches, so check the map at the start and restart if a fourth altar is unavailable.

steps.text: Open the Expedition map and locate four church icons; restart before investing in the run if only three churches generated.
Travel to four different churches and interact with the altar inside each one.
After the fourth altar, rest at a @loc{Site of Grace} if the flask counter does not immediately show seven charges.

achievements.description: Defeated 10 or more Great Enemies on one Expedition.
achievements.summary: Defeat @mechanic{10 Great Enemies} during one Expedition.

guide.context: A qualifying kill displays “Great Enemy Felled.” Mandatory Day 1 and Day 2 bosses, red-health-bar field bosses, and Gaol bosses all count.

steps.text: At the start of an Expedition, mark nearby boss camps and Gaols so the group can move between high-value targets with little downtime.
Defeat ten enemies that trigger the @mechanic{Great Enemy Felled} message before the Expedition ends; include both mandatory night bosses in the count.

achievements.summary: Use a @item{Stonesword Key} to enter Gaols and defeat an @enemy{Oldest Gaol boss}.

guide.context: Gaols are the large gray circles on the map. After all eight Expeditions, the Grand Burning Scene relic can supply a Stonesword Key at the start of a run.

steps.text: Loot a @item{Stonesword Key} from the chest at a large fort, or equip @item{Grand Burning Scene} after all eight Expeditions are complete.
Visit Gaols marked by large gray circles, spend a Stonesword Key at the imp statue, and enter the arena.
Repeat Gaols until the stronger @enemy{Oldest Gaol boss} appears, then defeat it before the Expedition ends.

achievements.description: Acquired many pieces of high-rarity equipment and items on a single Expedition.
achievements.summary: During one Expedition, fill six weapon slots with purple-or-legendary weapons, two talisman slots with blue-or-better talismans, and four item slots with purple-or-legendary consumables.

guide.context: Stonesword Keys do not satisfy the item requirement. If the four standard item slots do not trigger the unlock, buy a Pouch and fill its fifth slot with another high-rarity consumable.

steps.text: During one Expedition, equip @mechanic{six purple-or-legendary weapons} across all weapon slots.
Equip @mechanic{two blue-or-better talismans}.
Fill all four standard item slots with @mechanic{purple-or-legendary consumables}; do not count a Stonesword Key.
If the achievement remains locked, buy a @item{Pouch} from a merchant and place a fifth purple-or-legendary consumable in the new slot.

achievements.summary: Kill the @enemy{Fell Omen} before it escapes during its Day 1 raid.

guide.context: The raid appears predictably in the third Sentient Pest Expedition shortly after the first circle closes; being killed during the encounter fails it.

steps.text: Launch the @mechanic{Sentient Pest Expedition} for the third time and progress through Day 1 until the first circle closes.
Watch for the falling Fell Omen and move immediately to its impact marker.
Defeat the @enemy{Fell Omen} before it leaves the battlefield, without dying during the raid.

achievements.summary: Follow the insect tornado during the @enemy{Sentient Pest raid} and kill its moth miniboss.

guide.context: The raid appears predictably on Day 1 of the fourth Augur Expedition. Swarm hits remove one full level, and victory restores the stolen levels.

steps.text: Launch the @mechanic{Augur Expedition} for the fourth time and progress until the insect tornado appears on Day 1.
Follow the moving swarm while avoiding its damaging insects.
Defeat the moth miniboss at the end of the swarm's route to complete the raid.

achievements.summary: Enter the blue bubble inside the red danger area and defeat @enemy{Augur} during its Day 2 raid.

guide.context: The raid appears predictably in the third Sentient Pest Expedition; a death during the encounter fails the raid.

steps.text: Launch the @mechanic{Sentient Pest Expedition} for the third time and survive into Day 2.
When the red danger area appears, travel into it and cross the blue bubble's boundary.
Defeat @enemy{Augur} inside the bubble without dying.

achievements.summary: Reach the marked merchant during the Equilibrious Beast raid and pay its requested @mechanic{15,000–35,000 runes}.

guide.context: The raid predictably appears on Day 2 of the eighth Night Aspect Expedition and halves maximum HP until the payment is made; one squad member can pay for everyone.

steps.text: Launch the @mechanic{Night Aspect Expedition} for the eighth time and survive into Day 2.
Keep at least @mechanic{35,000 runes} unspent so any version of the merchant's demand can be paid immediately.
Follow the special merchant marker and confirm the displayed rune payment; in co-op, only one player needs to pay.

achievements.description: Defeated three different Nightlords in a row.
achievements.summary: Defeat @mechanic{three different Nightlords} in consecutive successful Expeditions without a failed run.

guide.context: A failed Expedition resets the streak, and repeating the same Nightlord does not advance the different-target requirement.

steps.text: Choose three different familiar Nightlords and prepare a reliable character and relic loadout.
Complete the three Expeditions back to back; do not start an experimental run or allow any Expedition to end in defeat between victories.
